title: CSV option is visible in the Report Type dropdown
verifies: the CSV (Data) option appears in the report type OSelect dropdown

title: Selecting CSV hides Attachment Type and Custom Dimensions
verifies: selecting CSV hides the email attachment type dropdown and custom dimensions section

title: Save a report with CSV type succeeds
verifies: a full create-report flow with CSV type completes and the report appears in the list

title: Switching from CSV back to PDF restores Attachment Type and Custom Dimensions
verifies: toggling from CSV to PDF re-displays the attachment type and custom dimensions controls

title: Selecting PNG type shows PNG warning banner
verifies: selecting PNG as the report type displays the PNG deprecation warning banner

title: Edit mode: a previously saved CSV report shows CSV as selected and controls hidden
verifies: editing a CSV report reflects CSV as selected and keeps attachment type + dimensions hidden
